channel.title: Martina Murphy Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Martina Murphy Blog

item.title: Authoritative Financial POA Solicitors
item.description:
Authoritative Financial POA Solicitors

Secure Your Wealth, Property, and Business Interests

Financial planning is not only about building wealth. It is also about ensuring that your affairs can continue to be managed if you become unavailable, incapacitated, or unable to make decisions for yourself.

Without appropriate legal authority in place, even close family members may be unable to access bank accounts, manage investments, complete property transactions, or make important financial decisions on your behalf.

item.title: Authoritative Medical Power of Attorney Solicitors
item.description:
Authoritative Medical Power of Attorney Solicitors

Protect Your Dignity and Control Your Future Healthcare

If you suffer an unexpected medical emergency, ensure your healthcare and end-of-life choices are made by someone you explicitly trust.

We draft watertight legal instruments that protect your voice, safeguard your dignity, and prevent your family from having to make agonising decisions without clear guidance.

The Heavy Burden of Unexpected Medical Crises

For many individuals and families, the prospect of a sudden health crisis creates significant anxiety.

item.title: Car Injury Solicitors
item.description:
Car Injury Solicitors

Protecting Your Recovery, Financial Security, and Future After a Serious Collision

A severe car accident can disrupt your physical health and immediately threaten your financial security.

When you are dealing with painful injuries, lost income, and uncertainty about the future, the last thing you need is pressure from insurance companies or complex legal procedures.

We step in to manage the legal process, deal with insurers on your behalf, and pursue the compensation you deserve so you can focus entirely on your recovery.

item.title: Child Custody Solicitors
item.description:
Child Custody Solicitors

Protect Your Children, Secure Your Rights, and Restore Stability

A child custody dispute is often the most emotionally challenging aspect of any family separation.

When your relationship with your children feels uncertain, the stress can be overwhelming. Parents are frequently left worried about access arrangements, future stability, and whether their voices will be heard.

We provide experienced, compassionate legal guidance designed to protect your children, secure your parental rights, and help establish a stable path forward for your family.

item.title: Commissioner for Oaths Solicitors
item.description:
Commissioner for Oaths Solicitors

Fast, Authoritative Document Certification When Accuracy Matters Most

When a government body, financial institution, court, or regulatory authority requires sworn documentation, a simple signature is often not enough.

Whether you need an affidavit sworn, a statutory declaration witnessed, or certified copies of important documents, accuracy is essential. Even minor administrative errors can result in delays, rejected applications, and unnecessary costs.

We provide efficient, professional Commissioner for Oaths services to ensure your documents are properly executed and legally compliant the first time.

item.title: Conveyancing Solicitor
item.description:
Conveyancing Solicitor

Flawless Property Transactions to Protect Your Most Valuable Asset

Buying or selling property should be a milestone of success, not a source of sleepless nights over title defects, planning concerns, or delayed mortgage approvals.

Whether you are purchasing your first home, selling an investment property, or acquiring commercial premises, every legal detail matters.

We manage your property transaction with precision and care, ensuring your interests are protected from contract to completion.

item.title: Divorce & Assets
item.description:
Divorce & Assets

Protecting Your Financial Independence and Your Family’s Future

The breakdown of a marriage is one of life’s most challenging experiences.

While the emotional impact can be overwhelming, the financial consequences often have long-term implications for your future, your children, and your financial security.

When significant assets, businesses, pensions, investments, or family property are involved, it is essential to obtain clear legal advice and experienced representation.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide practical, strategic guidance to help clients navigate complex financial matters while protecting their long-term interests.

item.title: Drafting Wills
item.description:
Drafting Wills

Preserving Your Life’s Work and Protecting Your Family

Creating a will is one of the most important steps you can take to protect your family and preserve the assets you have worked hard to build.

A properly drafted will provides certainty, reduces the risk of disputes, and ensures that your wishes are respected after your death.

Without a valid will, your estate may be distributed according to the rules of intestacy, which may not reflect your intentions or adequately provide for your loved ones.

item.title: Elder Law Solicitors
item.description:
Elder Law Solicitors

Protecting the Dignity, Wealth, and Autonomy of Older Adults

As we grow older, planning for the future becomes increasingly important.

Whether you are safeguarding your own interests or helping an aging parent navigate legal and financial decisions, having the right legal protections in place can provide certainty, dignity, and peace of mind.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we help individuals and families prepare for the future through practical legal planning designed to protect personal autonomy, family wealth, and long-term wellbeing.

item.title: Enduring Power of Attorney (EPA)
item.description:
Enduring Power of Attorney (EPA)

Secure Your Future Autonomy and Protect Your Family’s Peace of Mind

Planning for the future is one of the most important decisions you can make for yourself and your loved ones.

An Enduring Power of Attorney (EPA) allows you to decide in advance who will manage your affairs if you become unable to make decisions due to illness, injury, or loss of mental capacity.

Without proper planning, your family may face significant legal and administrative challenges during an already difficult time.

item.title: Estate Planning
item.description:
Estate Planning

Securing Your Wealth and Protecting Your Family’s Future

Estate planning is far more than preparing a legal document. It is about ensuring that everything you have built over a lifetime—your property, savings, and business—is protected and passed on smoothly to the people you care about most.

Without proper planning, your estate may face unnecessary delays, tax burdens, and disputes that can place emotional and financial strain on your family.

item.title: Expert Divorce Solicitors
item.description:
Expert Divorce Solicitors

Securing Your Future with Clarity and Dignity

Navigating the breakdown of a marriage is one of the most emotionally exhausting and financially significant transitions in life.

A divorce is not only an emotional process but also a high-stakes financial restructuring involving property, pensions, business assets, and future stability.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide clear, structured legal guidance combined with strong representation to ensure your financial independence and family stability are fully protected.

item.title: Fair Deal Scheme Solicitors
item.description:
Fair Deal Scheme Solicitors

Protect Your Family’s Home and Wealth While Securing the Best Care

Making decisions about long-term care for a loved one can be one of the most difficult experiences a family faces.

Alongside the emotional challenges, many families worry about how nursing home costs will affect the family home, savings, farms, businesses, and future inheritance.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide clear legal guidance on the Nursing Home Support Scheme (Fair Deal Scheme), helping families understand their options, protect their interests, and secure access to the care their loved ones need.

item.title: Family Home & Property
item.description:
Family Home & Property

Securing Your Most Valuable Asset in a Divorce

The family home is often the most valuable asset involved in a separation or divorce.

Beyond its financial value, it represents security, stability, family memories, and, for many parents, continuity for their children.

When relationships break down, questions surrounding ownership, occupation, mortgage responsibility, and future housing arrangements can quickly become complex.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide practical, strategic legal advice to help clients protect their interests while working towards fair and sustainable property arrangements.

item.title: General Power of Attorney Solicitors
item.description:
General Power of Attorney Solicitors

Secure Your Affairs with Legally Watertight POA Paperwork

Life does not stop when you are travelling, recovering from illness, managing business commitments abroad, or otherwise unavailable to handle important matters personally.

A properly drafted General Power of Attorney allows someone you trust to manage specific legal, financial, or property-related matters on your behalf while ensuring your interests remain protected.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we prepare clear, legally robust Power of Attorney documents that provide certainty, protect your assets, and ensure your affairs continue without unnecessary disruption.

item.title: House Purchase Solicitor
item.description:
House Purchase Solicitor

Secure Your Dream Home Without the Administrative Stress

Buying a property should be a milestone of success, not a source of sleepless nights over hidden title defects, planning issues, or banking delays.

A property is likely the largest financial investment you will ever make. Every legal detail matters.

We execute your property purchase with absolute precision, ensuring your investment is protected and your transaction progresses smoothly from sale agreed to receiving the keys.

item.title: House Purchase Solicitor Fees
item.description:
House Purchase Solicitor Fees

Absolute Financial Certainty Before You Sign the Contracts

Buying a property is one of the largest financial commitments most people will ever make.

The last thing you need is uncertainty about legal fees, unexpected costs, or hidden charges appearing shortly before completion.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we believe financial transparency is essential. We provide clear, itemised fee information from the outset, allowing you to budget with confidence and proceed with certainty.

item.title: Inheritance & Succession Solicitors
item.description:
Inheritance & Succession Solicitors

Protecting Your Family’s Wealth and Legacy

Managing the transfer of wealth to the next generation is one of the most important legal and financial decisions you will ever make.

Whether you are planning for the future of a family business, preserving a farm for future generations, protecting family property, or administering the estate of a loved one, effective succession planning requires careful legal guidance.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we help individuals, families, and business owners create clear, tax-efficient inheritance and succession strategies that protect assets, reduce uncertainty, and preserve family harmony.

item.title: Judicial Separation Solicitors
item.description:
Judicial Separation Solicitors

Providing Clarity and Protection When Your Marriage Ends

The breakdown of a marriage is one of life’s most challenging experiences.

When a relationship ends, important questions arise about finances, property, children, and future security. For many couples, a judicial separation provides a formal legal framework that allows these matters to be resolved without immediately pursuing a divorce.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide practical, compassionate, and strategic legal advice to help you navigate this difficult transition with confidence and clarity.

item.title: Leading Family Law Solicitors
item.description:
Leading Family Law Solicitors

Protecting Your Children, Your Assets, and Your Future Independence

Navigating a marriage breakdown or child custody dispute can be one of the most emotionally and financially challenging experiences a family will ever face.

When important decisions must be made regarding your children, your home, your finances, and your future, clear legal guidance becomes essential.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide practical, compassionate, and strategic family law advice designed to help you move forward with confidence. Our focus is always on protecting your interests while seeking solutions that minimise unnecessary conflict wherever possible.

item.title: Personal Injury at Work
item.description:
Personal Injury at Work

Protecting Your Health, Career, and Financial Future

A serious workplace injury can affect far more than your physical wellbeing.

It can threaten your ability to earn an income, create uncertainty about your future, and place significant financial pressure on your family.

When your livelihood is at stake, you need experienced legal advisors who can provide clear guidance, strong representation, and practical support throughout the claims process.

item.title: Power of Attorney Solicitors
item.description:
Power of Attorney Solicitors

Retain Control of Your Future and Protect Your Family’s Peace of Mind

Planning for the future means ensuring that your financial, property, and personal affairs remain protected if you become unable to make decisions for yourself.

A properly drafted Power of Attorney allows you to appoint trusted individuals to act on your behalf, providing certainty for both you and your family during challenging circumstances.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide practical, compassionate, and legally robust advice on Powers of Attorney, helping clients safeguard their independence, dignity, and assets through effective future planning.

item.title: Probate Disputes
item.description:
Probate Disputes

Resolving Family Conflicts with Clarity and Gravitas

When a loved one passes away, the grieving process is difficult enough without the added strain of a legal dispute over their estate.

Probate disputes can create significant emotional stress, damage family relationships, and place valuable assets at risk.

Whether you are an executor defending a will, a beneficiary seeking answers, or a family member concerned about the administration of an estate, you need experienced legal guidance and clear advice.

item.title: Proven Personal Injury & Accidents Solicitors
item.description:
Proven Personal Injury & Accidents Solicitors

Aggressive Compensation Recovery. Total Career Protection.

A sudden accident can affect far more than your physical health.

It can disrupt your ability to work, create financial uncertainty, and place significant pressure on your family.

Our experienced personal injury solicitors pursue the compensation you are legally entitled to while helping protect your employment rights and financial future.

The Hidden Financial Trauma of a Sudden Accident

For many individuals and families, the aftermath of an accident can be overwhelming.

item.title: Proven Road Traffic Accidents Solicitors
item.description:
Proven Road Traffic Accidents Solicitors

Aggressive Compensation Recovery. Total Focus on Your Healing.

A serious road traffic accident can change your life in an instant.

Beyond the physical injuries, many people face financial uncertainty, lost income, vehicle damage, and concerns about their future wellbeing.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we handle the legal process on your behalf, allowing you to focus on your recovery while we pursue the compensation you may be entitled to receive.

item.title: Proven Solicitors for Selling a Property
item.description:
Proven Solicitors for Selling a Property

Maximise Your Return Without the Administrative Stress

Selling a property should represent an exciting transition to the next stage of your life, not a source of unnecessary stress and uncertainty.

Whether you are moving home, downsizing, relocating, or selling an investment property, the legal process must be handled efficiently and correctly.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide practical, straightforward advice and meticulous legal support to help ensure your property sale progresses smoothly from instruction through to completion.

item.title: Respected Legal Guardianship Solicitors
item.description:
Establishing legal guardianship ensures you have the unquestionable right to make vital medical, educational, and welfare decisions for a child or vulnerable relative.

We provide the watertight legal frameworks necessary to formalise your role, shielding your family from uncertainty and potential state intervention.

The Anxiety of Unrecognised Caregiving

For unmarried fathers, step-parents, and relatives caring for a vulnerable family member, the anxiety of being legally invisible can be overwhelming.

Questions that frequently arise include:

item.title: Respected Legal Guardianship Solicitors
item.description:
Respected Legal Guardianship Solicitors

Secure Your Right to Protect and Decide for Your Loved Ones

Establishing legal guardianship ensures that you have the authority to make important decisions regarding the welfare, education, healthcare, and future of a child or vulnerable family member.

Without formal legal recognition, even devoted caregivers can find themselves excluded from critical decisions during emergencies or significant life events.

At Martina Murphy Solicitors, we provide practical, compassionate, and effective legal advice to help families establish guardianship arrangements that offer certainty, protection, and peace of mind.

item.title: Wills and Probate
item.description:
Wills and Probate

Securing Your Family’s Future with Dignity and Certainty

Drafting a will or managing the estate of a loved one who has passed is never just a legal transaction—it is a deeply personal, emotional responsibility.

When it comes to wills and probate, leaving things to chance can result in devastating financial and familial consequences down the line. You need absolute certainty that your life’s work is protected and your family is provided for.

item.title: First Post
item.description: Hello from Hugo.
